articles.title: NASA picks SpaceX for more crew flights
articles.summary: NASA needs more space trips. Boeing is not ready. NASA gives more jobs to SpaceX.
articles.impact: SpaceX gets more contracts as Boeing faces delays.

articles.title: Motorola phones add Amazon codes
articles.summary: Motorola phones add codes to Amazon app. This happens secretly. It affects even costly phones.
articles.impact: Your phone may track Amazon purchases without your knowledge.

articles.title: Google Gemini limits frustrate users
articles.summary: Google Gemini users face problems. They hit limits fast. One user hit limits with one command.
articles.impact: Google's AI tool has issues with its usage limits.

articles.title: New LEGO game rated in Korea
articles.summary: A new LEGO game is coming. It is called LEGO Skylines. It was rated in Korea.
articles.impact: A new LEGO game, Skylines, is likely coming soon.

articles.title: Persona 4 music hints at revival
articles.summary: Music for 'Persona 4 Revival' is listed. This suggests a trailer is coming. It's on a music database.
articles.impact: New music hints at an upcoming Persona 4 game announcement.

articles.title: Free game for Switch Online members
articles.summary: Switch Online members can play a game free. It is called BALL x PIT. Play it until June 1st.
articles.impact: Nintendo Switch Online members get a free game trial.

articles.title: ARC Raiders adds new outfits
articles.summary: ARC Raiders game has an update. New color options for an outfit. They are Midnight and Crimson Frost.
articles.impact: Players of ARC Raiders can buy new cosmetic items.

articles.title: TEVI gets new DLC soon
articles.summary: TEVI is getting new content. It is called 'Fauna Arcana'. It releases on PC June 25th.
articles.impact: New content for TEVI is coming next month.
